SILVERMAN IN SUPPORT OF NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), SPECIAL INTERROGATIES (SET ONE), REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SETS ONE), MOTION THAT THE REQUEST (TRANSACTION ID # 210047287) FILED BY DEFENDANT EXECUTIVE PARK PROPERTIES, LLC KHODJA, SAM
ORDER ; STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR MOTION TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT EXECUTIVE PARK PROPERTIES, LLC, SAM KHODJA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), SPECIAL INTERROGATIES (SET ONE), REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SETS ONE), MOTION THAT THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, (SET ONE) BE DEEMED ADMITTED. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS ARE ORDERED TO RESPOND TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE), WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS. REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS (SET ONE) ARE HEREBY DEEMED ADMITTED. PLAINTIFFS AND THEIR COUNSEL, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, ARE ORDERED TO PAY $3,200.00 IN MONETARY SANCTIONS TO DEFENDANT WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING THE COURT'S RULING VERBATIM AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT JPDEOL@DHILLONLAW.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOHN-PAUL DEOL, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTORNEY CHRISTOPHER ALLEN BROSE SET ON JUN-26-2023 CONTINUED TO JUL-17-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR FAILURE TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCE BY ATTORNEY CHRISTOPHER ALLEN BROSE. THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS FOR FAILURE TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING OBJECTION TO NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS, AND FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT TODAY'S OSC HEARING. FURTHER SANCTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $700.00 IS IMPOSED. TOTAL AMOUNT OF SANCTIONS IS $900.00, PAYABLE BY JUL-14-2023. THIS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WILL BE DISCHARGED AND TAKEN OFF CALENDAR IF SANCTIONS IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $900.00 ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. THE COURT WILL IMPOSE ADDITIONAL SANCTIONS FOR A TOTAL OF MORE THAN $1,000.00 AND WILL BE REPORTED TO THE STATE BAR, IF COUNSEL FAILS TO APPEAR AT THE NEXT OSC HEARING OF JUL-17-2023. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogaties (Set One), Request For Production Of Documents (Sets One), Motion That The Request For Admissions, (Set One) Be Deemed Admitted; And
Off Calendar Oct-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Timothy Silverman, Esq. 415-491-8900 Scheer Law Group for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

Party stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem Judge. The pro tem Judge and Mr. Silverman authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

The matter is not contested. Mr. Silverman accepts the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EXECUTIVE PARK PROPERTIES, LLC, SAM KHODJA's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogaties (Set One), Request For Production Of Documents (Sets One), Motion That The Request For Admissions, (Set One) Be Deemed Admitted.

The unopposed motion is granted. Plaintiffs are ordered to respond to Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One) and Request for Production of Documents (Set One), without objections, within ten (10) calendar days. Request for Admissions (Set One) are hereby deemed admitted. Plaintiffs and their counsel, jointly and severally, are ordered to pay $3,200.00 in monetary sanctions to Defendant within ten (10) calendar days.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating the Court's ruling verbatim and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at JPDeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
